_method: All addresses verified via eth_getCode against rpc.pharos.xyz (chain 1672) and atlantic.dplabs-internal.com (chain 688689). Source: assets/ecosystem.json (official Pharos Port ecosystem directory).
_note: All major DeFi protocols on Pharos are MAINNET (1672), not testnet. Atlantic testnet (688689) only has Faroo currently. Skill targets mainnet by default.

morpho.name: Morpho Blue (Pharos deployment)
morpho._critical_note: Pharos uses a DISTINCT Morpho core address — NOT the canonical 0xBBBB...FFCb used on other chains.
morpho.apy_method: iterate active markets via market(bytes32) → compute supply rate from totalSupplyAssets / totalBorrowAssets utilization + IRM rate

termmax.name: TermMax (Term Structure)
termmax.apy_method: Fixed rate per market — read from MarketViewer; durations are termed

aquaflux.name: AquaFlux RWA Structured Yield
aquaflux._note: Tri-token model: yield token / principal token / collateral token + Uniswap V4-style AMM
aquaflux.apy_method: Per-tranche; read via Core proxy view functions or token-specific oracle prices

zona.name: Zona (RWA Lending — Aave V3 fork)
zona._note: Aave V3 architecture — use Aave-style getReserveData() for supply APY

r25_axil.name: R25 — Axil Consumer Credit Vaults
r25_axil._note: Curated by Axil, audited by SlowMist & BlockSec. USDC settlement, 1 USDC min, 0% fees, instant minting.
r25_axil.apy_method: ERC-4626 — snapshot pricePerShare via previewRedeem(1e18) over time

native_pros_staking.name: Native PROS Staking
native_pros_staking._note: Native protocol staking — not an ERC-20 contract. Use validator delegation flow.
native_pros_staking.apy_method: Read from validator set / Pharos staking precompile (TBD — needs Pharos staking docs)

faroo_liquid_staking.name: Faroo Liquid Staking (stPROS)
faroo_liquid_staking._note: Mainnet contract map is empty (1672:{} in live app config); UI shows 'Coming Soon'. Testnet stPROS at 0xc9A0B63... is functional. Skip mainnet entries until live.

atlantic-testnet._note: Only Faroo is currently live on Atlantic testnet. All other protocols moved/exist only on Pacific mainnet (1672).

_removed_from_v1.elfi: ELFi is a derivatives DEX on Arbitrum & Base only. NOT on Pharos. Removed entirely.
_removed_from_v1.morpho_canonical: The 0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37EEFFCb address used on most chains is NOT deployed on Pharos. The Pharos Morpho deployment uses 0x18573fA18fd17dDfD790B4a5B5b2977aad3b4Efb instead.
